summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Night City Assistant new language toggle and Share Hint features. All backend language functionality working correctly. Frontend language toggle, Share Hint button, and settings dialog all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Backend POST /api/analyze with language='en' returns hint in English
Backend POST /api/analyze with language='ru' returns hint in Russian
Backend POST /api/analyze with default language returns Russian hint
Frontend language toggle button exists with data-testid='language-toggle-btn'
Language toggle shows RU/EN correctly and switches between languages
Image upload shows preview with Get Hint button
Get Hint sends correct language parameter and returns response
Share Hint button appears after getting hint with data-testid='share-hint-btn'
Share Hint generates downloadable PNG image successfully
Settings dialog shows current language selection (English/Russian)
Made with Emergent badge remains hidden
Language toggle affects hint generation - Russian hints in Cyrillic, English hints in Latin
Full end-to-end workflow with language switching functional
AI responses correctly follow language parameter from frontend
